message.content:
(1) **Overall aesthetic**: Terminal-inspired, minimalist with a tech-focused, dark theme.  
(2) **Background treatment**: Subtle dark grid of small, faint green dots (terminal-like texture).  
(3) **Typography**: Monospace (e.g., `Fira Code`/similar) for code elements; sans-serif (e.g., `Inter`) for body. Hierarchy: Large, bold name ("Aleksa") with green accent; smaller, lighter subheadings; code snippets in monospace.  
(4) **Color palette**: Primary: Black (#121212); Accent: Bright green (#00FF00); Secondary: Light gray (#AAAAAA); Dark gray (#333333) for UI elements.  
(5) **AI chatbot**: Yes — a terminal-style chat interface (`~/ask-me.sh`) with a "ready" status and pre-written prompts.  
(6) **Navigation style**: Top bar with text-based links (`/home`, `/projects`, etc.) in light gray; a dark mode toggle (sun icon) on the right.  
(7) **Motion/animation hints**: Likely subtle hover effects on links/buttons; chatbot may have smooth transitions (e.g., prompt fade-in).  
(8) **Hero headline/CTA**: Headline: `$ hi, I'm Aleksa` (with "Aleksa" in green); CTA: Bright green button `→ get in touch`.
